About Us

Africa's Shield. Built to Last.

Afrishield Drilling Solutions is a proudly African drilling and mining services company established to deliver safe, innovative, and world-class drilling solutions to the mining, exploration, construction, water, and infrastructure sectors across Africa.

Founded on the belief that Africa deserves a drilling contractor that combines international technical standards with local expertise, operational excellence, and an unwavering commitment to safety.

Every drilling project represents a significant investment. Our responsibility is to protect that investment through reliable equipment, experienced personnel, efficient project execution, and uncompromising quality.

AFRI
Africa Represents the continent, its people, natural resources, and enormous economic potential.
SHIELD
Protection & Strength Symbolizes reliability, resilience, trust, and security — safeguarding every project.
An African drilling company that provides strong, reliable, and dependable drilling solutions while protecting clients' investments through safe, efficient, and professional operations.
What We Do

Drilling Services

Our Foundation

Vision, Mission & Values

Vision
Africa's Most Trusted Driller

To become Africa's most trusted and respected drilling contractor, delivering world-class drilling and mining support services that contribute to sustainable mineral development throughout the continent.

Mission
Safe. Innovative. Efficient.

To provide safe, innovative, efficient, and cost-effective drilling solutions through modern technology, highly skilled professionals, and internationally recognized operational standards — creating lasting value for clients, employees, communities, and stakeholders.

Philosophy
Trust. Precision. Delivery.

We build long-term partnerships through trust, technical excellence, operational discipline, and consistent delivery. Every project is executed with precision and accountability — no exceptions.

Core Values

Why Afrishield

Competitive Advantage

Health · Safety · Environment · Quality

HSEQ & Sustainability

Afrishield Drilling Solutions is committed to zero harm through robust Health, Safety, Environment and Quality systems. Our operations align with internationally recognized management standards — ensuring our people, clients, and the environment are protected at every stage of every project.

ISO 9001Quality Management Systems
ISO 14001Environmental Management Systems
ISO 45001Occupational Health & Safety Management
Sustainability Pillars
  • Responsible mining & environmental protection
  • Local employment & skills development
  • Community engagement & social investment
  • Ethical business practices at every level
  • Diversity, equity & inclusion
  • Support for local suppliers & SMEs
  • Digital fleet monitoring & predictive maintenance
  • Rapid mobilisation with competitive pricing
Market Focus

Starting in Ghana.
Scaling Across Africa.

Operations commence in Ghana — a leading mining destination — with a clear expansion roadmap across the continent's most mineral-rich regions.
